project.name: skills-factory
project.description: Skill development workspace — SKILL-CRAFT methodology, per-skill development logs, expertise transfer system

last_session.summary: Research + brainstorming session: full web & frontend skills portfolio design. Deep research on 17+ web resources (gstack, browser-use, Chrome DevTools MCP, Stagehand, Vite 8, CSS 2026, Anthropic computer use). Design doc written (1000+ lines, 15 sections, 21 deliverables). Three-pass review (architect + QA + DevOps) produced 24 findings, all accepted by user. Decision record saved.

current_tasks: Apply 24 pass-3 review fixes to design doc

recent_decisions.decision: Three-tier architecture: shared MCP tools → specialist reference docs → web-router orchestration
recent_decisions.rationale: Prevents CC skill trigger collision, enables environment-specific paths

recent_decisions.decision: Specialists are reference docs inside web-router, NOT independent skills
recent_decisions.rationale: CC skill system activates all matching skills simultaneously — reference docs prevent collision

recent_decisions.decision: Separate web-tools MCP on droplet (not extending ai-cos-mcp)
recent_decisions.rationale: Fault isolation — Chrome crash must not kill Notion/calendar/thesis tools

recent_decisions.decision: 6-dimension tool selection framework (added output format dimension)
recent_decisions.rationale: 5 dimensions missed consumer type (JSON vs markdown vs streaming)

recent_decisions.decision: Phase 0 (tool evaluation) before any skill building
recent_decisions.rationale: Can't build tool selection framework on unverified tool capabilities

recent_decisions.decision: Cookie extraction needs production-grade tooling, not yt-dlp hack
recent_decisions.rationale: yt-dlp is YouTube downloader side-feature, not production cookie system

recent_decisions.decision: Droplet RAM upgrade ($12→$24) is Phase 1 prerequisite

next_session_priorities: Apply all 24 pass-3 review findings to design doc
Verify all downstream references cascade correctly (M2 lesson)
Generate final version of design doc

architecture.summary: Skill development workspace using SKILL-CRAFT methodology. Cash Build System v1.1-beta deployed with 6 hooks. ROADMAP.md checkout/commit model active.
